original_image_tags: Handwritten letter in blue ink on off-white paper. The paper has two hole-punch marks at the top. An upside-down ink stamp from the Department of Justice / FBI is visible at the bottom center, reading "U.S. DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE / FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION / RECEIVED / JUN 31 1952 / MR. JONES". A faint handwritten date "JUN 8 1952" is in the bottom left margin.

elements.description: A handwritten letter on paper containing mostly cursive text, two black circular punch holes at the top, and a faint upside-down stamp in the lower right corner.

judge.reason: Both agree on a handwritten letter with punch holes and a faint upside-down stamp, but Description A adds specific quoted stamp text and details that B omits without contradiction.
